error_signature: cannot reuse newly inserted row in workflow
title: Unable to reuse newly inserted row in workflow
symptom: The user cannot access the newly created team object in their workflow after inserting it into the database.
applies_when: Using an Insert action to add a new row
Trying to access the newly inserted row in subsequent actions
not_this_if: The workflow does not include an Insert action
The option to return inserted rows is enabled
root_cause: By default, the Insert action may not return the newly inserted rows unless explicitly configured to do so. This can lead to confusion when trying to reference the new data in subsequent steps of the workflow.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Insert action
Retry accessing the newly created team object
agent_instruction: Enable the 'return inserted rows' option in the Insert action settings.
